working_on.feature: FDIWork production cleanup after public UX and a11y fixes
working_on.task: Merged PR #3, fast-forwarded D:\MH\Headhunt_pj to origin/master, and cleaned local QA artifacts from the original checkout.
working_on.notes: Original checkout is on master at the PR #3 squash merge commit. The follow-up a11y code was first developed in D:\MH\Headhunt_pj_master_deploy, merged via PR #3, then pulled into D:\MH\Headhunt_pj.

pending_tasks.task: Wait for Vercel production deployment from merge commit b863d34, then run a short production smoke check.
Remove temporary worktree D:\MH\Headhunt_pj_master_deploy later if no longer needed.

recent_changes.description: Merged PR #3 into master with squash commit b863d34: resolved remaining Lighthouse accessibility issues by darkening the FDI orange token, fixing the hero location dropdown accessible name, and correcting job card heading order.
Fast-forwarded original folder D:\MH\Headhunt_pj from 75077d1 to b863d34 so it now contains the merged PR #3 code on master.
Merged PR #2 into master: Pagination uses Next.js Link, HomepageSectionDots uses IntersectionObserver, and EmployerBannerCarousel strings are localized to Vietnamese.
Merged PR #1 into master: WCAG A/AA fixes, DOMPurify XSS hardening, and auth bypass fix.

errors_encountered.error: GitNexus MCP detect_changes still reads the indexed checkout path and can report unrelated local files when work is done from a separate worktree.
errors_encountered.solution: Verified branch scope with git in the active worktree, and used GitNexus impact before symbol edits.

errors_encountered.error: Next.js dev with Turbopack failed in the clean worktree because node_modules is a junction outside the worktree root.
errors_encountered.solution: Ran local verification with next dev --webpack and inherited env vars from the original checkout.

decisions_made.decision: Commit tracked memory/context updates, but delete untracked QA artifacts locally.
decisions_made.reason: The tracked files are project context; screenshots/logs/.playwright-mcp/.windsurf were local generated artifacts and should not enter git.
Matches the recent PR merge pattern and keeps master history concise.

verification.notes: Vercel preview and preview comment checks passed before merge.
Targeted lint for PR #3 component changes.
Homepage 100 and /viec-lam 100 on local branch after PR #3 changes.
